scripts.build: /bin/zsh -lc 'export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH && set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env && set +a && turbo run build'
scripts.dev: /bin/zsh -lc 'export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH && set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env && set +a && turbo run dev --parallel'
scripts.dev:web: /bin/zsh -lc 'export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH && export PORT=${PORT:-3001} && set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env && set +a && npm run dev --workspace @portfolio/web'
scripts.typecheck: /bin/zsh -lc 'export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH && set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env && set +a && turbo run typecheck'
scripts.db:generate: /bin/zsh -lc 'export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH && set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env && set +a && npm run db:generate --workspace @portfolio/db'
scripts.db:migrate: /bin/zsh -lc 'export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH && set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env && set +a && npm run db:migrate --workspace @portfolio/db'
